ddls:
CREATE TABLE "antivirus_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antivirus program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the antivirus program */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the antivirus program */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the antivirus program */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system on which the antivirus program is tested */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* System architecture */,
  "system_requirements" TEXT /* System requirements for the antivirus program */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the antivirus program was released */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., Free, Paid, Trial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Boot time, Scan time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., seconds, milliseconds) */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the performance metric (e.g., Boot, Scan, Task) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., Time, Resource Usage) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., System Log, API, Manual Entry) */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the metric is a custom metric defined by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark result */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antivirus program being tested */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being tracked */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark test session */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark was performed */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric (e.g., 47.5, 412) */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the entire benchmark test session */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "test_user" TEXT /* User who performed the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES antivirus_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark test session */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark test session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark test session */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the benchmark test session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark test session was created */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the benchmark is a custom benchmark defined by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)
